title: Physical Layer Functionality and Signal Transmission
description: A visual breakdown of the OSI Physical Layer, illustrating its core functions, signal types, and the transformation of data from digital bits to a transmitted signal.
elements: Transmission Medium (e.g., Copper Cable, Fiber Optic)
relationships: Application data is converted into a stream of bits
Transmitter encodes bits into a signal suitable for the medium
Signal propagates through the transmission medium
Receiver decodes the signal back into a stream of bits
